channel.title: Posts on KyberWarlord
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on KyberWarlord

item.title: Stimulation and Cyberism
item.description: God is in my image, not the other way around Cyberism not inherently about the internet, or computation, or even of electronics or machines. It is inherently about control. Cyberism is the study of control, of will, of experience. Who is pulling your strings? Our existence is the mere collection of memories. We are only that, a collection of memories controlling a body. A body without organs, without ousia. We do have will, our memories perform this upon us.
